title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
